summary: Live PR inventory shard classified independently against the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected, no close/merge/fix action is allowed or safe from this job, and the only security-sensitive hydrated ref is routed separately without affecting unrelated open PRs.

actions.reason: Ready maintainer-owned focused bug fix; technical correctness and merge readiness are maintainer decisions outside this close/comment/label-only shard.
Draft PR with active author follow-up; keep open and independent rather than close or route into a fabricated canonical family.
Useful draft PR remains independent and should stay open for normal author/maintainer handling.
Maintainer-owned test consolidation needs maintainer correctness review; no autonomous closure or merge path is allowed.
Useful open feature PR with active author/review follow-up; keep open and independent, with no close or merge action from this shard.
Draft focused bug-fix PR has failed proof and unresolved bot review feedback; keep open for author/maintainer follow-up.
Focused maintainer PR with green proof needs maintainer technical review; this shard cannot merge or repair it.
Large useful PR has unresolved review-bot feedback and author follow-up; keep open and independent.
Contributor PR is assigned to maintainers and appears ready for maintainer correctness review; no autonomous close/merge/fix action is available.
Draft Telegram/session-state PR should stay open; no low-signal, duplicate, or superseded evidence supports closure.
Route the exact security-sensitive linked PR to central OpenClaw security handling without mutating it or the unrelated inventory PRs.

needs_human: #88361: maintainer-owned focused daemon bug fix is ready for maintainer look; technical correctness and merge readiness require maintainer review.
#93178: maintainer-owned test/gateway smoke consolidation is ready for maintainer look; correctness and CI intent require maintainer review.
#86365: focused maintainer UI bug fix has green proof and is ready for maintainer look, but merge/fix actions are blocked in this shard.
#87304: assigned contributor P1 update fix has green proof and needs maintainer technical review before any merge path.
